Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}You can now speak to Elizabeth about accepting and reporting requests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Requests can involve anything from hunting for items to fusing specific Personas. When you complete a request, you will be rewarded.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}{f 4 8 0}Additional requests will become available as you {f 0 1 2}make progress in your exploration or complete certain previous requests{f 0 1 27}. Start by taking a look at the requests that are currently listed.[n]{f 1 1}
